title: PharmCheck dev-package (v1)
description: Interchange format for bringing PharmCheck development done in a standalone Claude Chat back into the repo. Content-only round-trip: records are validated + forced to draft by scripts/pharm-ingest.mjs. Structural changes are proposals, not code.

author_note.description: Human-readable summary of what this package contains and why.

generated_against_export.description: Which PHARMCHECK-EXPORT.md snapshot this was built against (date/tag).

capabilities.description: Map of capability key → records to author. Keys MUST be authorable capabilities (see DEVELOPMENT-INSTRUMENT.md §Authorable). Anything else belongs in structural_proposals.

provenance_defaults.description: Shared provenance for these records. reviewed_by/review_status are IGNORED (forced to null/draft by the adapter).

source_ref.description: Shared source id; for dose_evidence set source_ref PER RECORD instead (must equal citation.identifier).

records.description: Entity objects for the capability (NO provenance needed unless a per-record field like dose_evidence source_ref applies). Shapes are the capability's domain schema — see the export bundle §5.

structural_proposals.description: Changes that need engineer work here (new capability, schema change, new firewall check). NOT auto-applied — surfaced for review.
